payload.diagram_title: Most cross-platform mobile apps are over-complicating
quality_notes: Include one fenced visual block that matches the planned diagram type.
Keep the post in the LinkedIn sweet spot: roughly 140 to 340 words.

post_text:
Most cross-platform mobile apps are over-complicating native AI inference 🤔.

I was wrong to think model quantization was the silver bullet 🚀.

1️⃣ Quantization is not a one-size-fits-all

2️⃣ Knowledge distillation requires careful

3️⃣ Mobile devices have unique constraints 📈

The Problem  | Core Concept | How It Works
Avoiding common pitfalls in model quantization and knowledge distillation is key 🔑.

I finally understood that a balanced approach is necessary 🌈.
💬 What's your go-to architecture for native AI inference:

1️⃣ The Problem 2️⃣ Core Concept 3️⃣ #SystemDesign #SoftwareArchitecture #SystemDesign #DistributedSystems #SoftwareArchitecture
